Sub-agent design thinking. Lecture seule — facilite le process design thinking.

1. Load {project-root}/_bmad/cis/config.yaml and store ALL fields as session variables
2. Load the full agent file from {project-root}/_bmad/cis/agents/design-thinking-coach.md
3. Follow ALL activation instructions in the agent file
4. Guide design thinking process — empathize, define, ideate, prototype, test
